title: Brave at Bedtime
lesson: The dark isn't scary when you feel cozy and safe; you can be brave.
prompts: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits up on the bed hugging the teddy bear, looking a little unsure about the dark, facing the camera with their face fully visible and well-lit. Medium shot at eye level, a soft warm glow fills the room, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left in the mid-ground on the bed, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and a slightly worried expression, still hugging the teddy bear. In the right foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside the bed reaching toward a small night-light, smiling warmly and reassuringly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, gentle warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left on the bed, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a calmer expression, hugging the teddy bear. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} leans in tucking a soft blanket around them, smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy bear beside them, calmer now, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image snuggles down alone under the blanket, hugging the teddy bear with a small brave smile, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy bear tucked close and a content, peaceful expression, no longer afraid of the dark, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening, the child sits up on the bed hugging a teddy bear, looking unsure about the dark, in a soft warm glow.
In the evening bedroom, the child (far left) sits on the bed hugging the teddy, a little worried, while the father at right kneels reaching toward a small night-light to switch it on.
In the bedroom now softly lit by the night-light, the child (far left) sits on the bed calmer, hugging the teddy, while the father at right leans in tucking a blanket around them.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy beside them, calmer now.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child snuggles down alone under the blanket hugging the teddy with a small brave smile.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy close, content and no longer afraid of the dark.
texts: It was bedtime. You sat up in bed hugging your teddy, feeling unsure about the dark.
"I'm a little bit scared," you said. Dad knelt down and switched on a soft, glowing night-light.
The room filled with a warm, cosy glow. Dad tucked your blanket in snug and gave you a smile.
You lay back on your pillow with teddy beside you. The dark didn't feel so scary now.
You snuggled down and gave a brave little smile. "I can be brave," you whispered.
Soon you rested, calm and cosy, not afraid at all. You were safe, and you were brave.
